script_text: Which word is a noun (a thing or person)?
A noun is a person, place, or thing. Dog is a thing!
Which word is a verb (an action)?
A verb shows action. Runs is something you do!
Pick the right word: "She ___ to school."
She walks. When it is one person doing it now, add an s!
Which word is an adjective (describes a thing)?
An adjective tells what something is like. Fluffy describes!
